initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    cd.cd_gender,
    cd.cd_marital_status,
    cd.cd_education_status,
    cd.cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd.cd_credit_rating,
    cd.cd_dep_count,
    cd.cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd.cd_dep_college_count,
    COUNT(*) AS count_star
FROM customer c
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ca.ca_county IN ('Rush County','Toole County','Jefferson County','Dona Ana County','La Porte County')
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 
      FROM store_sales ss
      JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
      WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
        AND d.d_year = 2002
        AND d.d_moy BETWEEN 1 AND 4
  )
  AND (
      EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 
          FROM web_sales ws
          JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
          WHERE ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
            AND d.d_year = 2002
            AND d.d_moy BETWEEN 1 AND 4
      )
      OR EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 
          FROM catalog_sales cs
          JOIN date_dim d ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
          WHERE cs.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
            AND d.d_year = 2002
            AND d.d_moy BETWEEN 1 AND 4
      )
  )
GROUP BY 
    cd.cd_gender,
    cd.cd_marital_status,
    cd.cd_education_status,
    cd.cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd.cd_credit_rating,
    cd.cd_dep_count,
    cd.cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd.cd_dep_college_count
ORDER BY 
    cd.cd_gender ASC,
    cd.cd_marital_status ASC,
    cd.cd_education_status ASC,
    cd.cd_purchase_estimate ASC,
    cd.cd_credit_rating ASC,
    cd.cd_dep_count ASC,
    cd.cd_dep_employed_count ASC,
    cd.cd_dep_college_count ASC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count,
    COUNT(*) AS count_star
FROM 
    customer
    JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    customer_address.ca_county IN ('Rush County','Toole County','Jefferson County','Dona Ana County','La Porte County')
    AND date_dim.d_year = 2002
    AND date_dim.d_moy BETWEEN 1 AND 4
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM web_sales 
        WHERE web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
        AND web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    )
    OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM catalog_sales 
        WHERE catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
        AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    )
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender ASC,
    cd_marital_status ASC,
    cd_education_status ASC,
    cd_purchase_estimate ASC,
    cd_credit_rating ASC,
    cd_dep_count ASC,
    cd_dep_employed_count ASC,
    cd_dep_college_count ASC
LIMIT 100;

    cd.cd_dep_count,

FROM customer c
JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ca.ca_county IN ('Rush County','Toole County','Jefferson County','Dona Ana County','La Porte County')
  AND EXISTS (

GROUP BY
